mapper.select: SELECT P.*, PI."FILE_NO", PI."FILE_NAME", PI."ORI_NAME", UI."FILE_NO" AS "PROFILE_FILE_NO", UI."FILE_NAME" AS "PROFILE_FILE_NAME", UI."ORI_NAME" AS "PROFILE_ORI_NAME", CASE WHEN PL."USER_NO" IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS "LIKED_BY_ME", S."USER_NICKNAME", UR."ROLE_NO", R."ROLE_NAME" FROM ( SELECT P0.* FROM "POST" P0 ORDER BY P0."FEED_DATE" DESC LIMIT #{perPage} OFFSET #{startNum} ) P LEFT JOIN "POST_IMG" PI ON P."FEED_NO" = PI."FEED_NO" LEFT JOIN "POST_LIKE" PL ON P."FEED_NO" = PL."FEED_NO" AND PL."USER_NO" = #{currentUserNo} LEFT JOIN "USER" S ON P."USER_NO" = S."USER_NO" LEFT JOIN "USER_IMG" UI ON S."USER_NO" = UI."USER_NO" LEFT JOIN "USER_ROLE" UR ON S."USER_NO" = UR."USER_NO" LEFT JOIN "ROLE" R ON UR."ROLE_NO" = R."ROLE_NO" ORDER BY P."FEED_DATE" DESC, PI."FILE_NO" ASC

SELECT P.*, PI."FILE_NO", PI."FILE_NAME", PI."ORI_NAME", UI."FILE_NO" AS "PROFILE_FILE_NO", UI."FILE_NAME" AS "PROFILE_FILE_NAME", UI."ORI_NAME" AS "PROFILE_ORI_NAME", CASE WHEN PL."USER_NO" IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS "LIKED_BY_ME", S."USER_NICKNAME", UR."ROLE_NO", R."ROLE_NAME" FROM "POST" P LEFT JOIN "POST_IMG" PI ON P."FEED_NO" = PI."FEED_NO" LEFT JOIN "POST_LIKE" PL ON P."FEED_NO" = PL."FEED_NO" AND PL."USER_NO" = #{currentUserNo} LEFT JOIN "USER" S ON P."USER_NO" = S."USER_NO" LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT UI."FILE_NO", UI."FILE_NAME", UI."ORI_NAME" FROM "USER_IMG" UI WHERE UI."USER_NO" = S."USER_NO" ORDER BY UI."FILE_NO" DESC LIMIT 1 ) UI ON TRUE LEFT JOIN "USER_ROLE" UR ON S."USER_NO" = UR."USER_NO" LEFT JOIN "ROLE" R ON UR."ROLE_NO" = R."ROLE_NO" WHERE P."FEED_NO" = #{feedNo} ORDER BY PI."FILE_NO" ASC

SELECT P.*, PI."FILE_NO", PI."FILE_NAME", PI."ORI_NAME", UI."FILE_NO" AS "PROFILE_FILE_NO", UI."FILE_NAME" AS "PROFILE_FILE_NAME", UI."ORI_NAME" AS "PROFILE_ORI_NAME", CASE WHEN PL."USER_NO" IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS "LIKED_BY_ME", S."USER_NICKNAME", UR."ROLE_NO", R."ROLE_NAME" FROM ( SELECT P0.* FROM "POST" P0 WHERE P0."USER_NO" = #{userNo} ORDER BY P0."FEED_DATE" DESC LIMIT #{perPage} OFFSET #{startNum} ) P LEFT JOIN "POST_IMG" PI ON P."FEED_NO" = PI."FEED_NO" LEFT JOIN "POST_LIKE" PL ON P."FEED_NO" = PL."FEED_NO" AND PL."USER_NO" = #{currentUserNo} LEFT JOIN "USER" S ON P."USER_NO" = S."USER_NO" LEFT JOIN "USER_IMG" UI ON S."USER_NO" = UI."USER_NO" LEFT JOIN "USER_ROLE" UR ON S."USER_NO" = UR."USER_NO" LEFT JOIN "ROLE" R ON UR."ROLE_NO" = R."ROLE_NO" ORDER BY P."FEED_DATE" DESC, PI."FILE_NO" ASC
